name: transcription-pro
description: A transcription application built with Electron, React, and TypeScript

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:react" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build:electron && electron .
scripts.dev:debug: concurrently "npm run dev:react" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development OPEN_DEVTOOLS=1 npm run build:electron && electron ."
scripts.build:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run build:android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:win: npm run generate-icon && npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:win:portable: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:mac: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --linux
scripts.publish: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --publish always
scripts.publish:win: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.publish:mac: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.publish:linux: npm run clean && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --publish always
